product_overview: Upchaar Health is a consumer-facing health platform that connects patients with doctors, clinics, and medical stores while providing searchable health content and role-specific dashboards. It supports doctor onboarding, health article discovery, and analytics-driven dashboards for patients and providers.
core_goals: Allow patients to discover health content and manage upcoming appointments and personal health actions.
Enable doctors to register, submit credentials, and manage consultation availability and performance.
Allow clinics and medical stores to manage branches, inventory/registrations, and monitor operational metrics.
Provide searchable, categorized health education (blogs) to help users find reliable health information quickly.

features.name: Doctor Onboarding
features.description: A multi-step application flow that lets healthcare providers create a profile, submit credentials and practice details, upload verification documents, and send the application for administrative review.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Start doctor onboarding -> Fill personal info (name, contact, profile) -> Fill credentials including medical license and specialization -> Enter practice details and availability -> Upload medical license and government ID documents -> Submit application -> See confirmation that application status is Pending for review
Navigate to / -> Start doctor onboarding -> Fill personal info with a required field left blank -> Attempt to submit application -> See inline validation error indicating the missing required field

features.name: Health Blog Search
features.description: Search and filter educational health articles by keywords and category to quickly surface relevant content.
user_flows: Navigate to /blogs -> Enter search query -> Apply category filter -> View filtered results -> Open a blog post -> Read full article
Navigate to /blogs -> Apply category filter without entering a query -> View filtered results for that category -> Open a blog post -> Read full article

features.name: Dashboard Analytics (Patient, Doctor, Clinic, Medical)
features.description: Role-specific dashboards that display performance and health metrics using charts and stats cards, with skeleton loading states during initial data load.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /patient/dashboard -> Observe skeleton loading state -> View donut charts and stats cards -> Use quick action to view upcoming appointments

Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /doctor/dashboard -> Observe skeleton loading state -> View donut charts and stats cards -> Access schedule and consultation items

Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /clinic/dashboard -> Observe skeleton loading state -> View donut charts and stats cards -> Review branch performance metrics

Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /medical/dashboard -> Observe skeleton loading state -> View donut charts and stats cards -> Review pending registrations or inventory summary

routes.description: Main landing page with service overview and doctor onboarding
Unified login page for patients, doctors, and providers
Patient appointment and health record management
Medical store inventory and registration management
Clinic branch and doctor performance management

features.name: Doctor Onboarding
features.description: Multi-step registration for new healthcare providers including credential verification and document upload
user_interactions: Click "Join as a Doctor" button in header
Fill personal info, credentials, and practice details
Upload medical license and ID documents

features.name: Health Blog Search
features.description: Searching and filtering medical articles by category and keywords
user_interactions: Enter search query in the search bar
Click on category filter pills (e.g., Wellness, Research)
View filtered results and navigate to a blog post

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Visualization of health and performance metrics across different roles
user_interactions: View donut charts and stats cards
Observe skeleton loading states during initial load
